name: Local Inference Daemon
description: Downloadable Deno background service for WebRTC or WebSocket access to loopback OpenAI-compatible local inference endpoints.

capabilities.description: Installable Deno service package for Windows, Linux, and macOS local inference.
Background bridge for approved local OpenAI-compatible model endpoints.

assets.description: Zipped Deno daemon source, compile tasks, and service installer.
Windows x64 daemon executable built by CI/CD.
Daemon setup, compile, and service installation instructions.

permissions.reason: Maintains WebRTC/WebSocket control channels and fetches user-approved loopback local inference endpoints.
Reads daemon configuration from environment variables.
